intro: Start by building your career knowledge base. Every resume and cover letter will be generated from this data.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Add and manage your work history. This is the source of truth.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Portfolio projects linked to your experience.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Your technical and soft skill database.

import.title: Import CV
import.description: Upload a resume and pre-fill your profile with AI.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your About Me bio and elevator pitch, generated from your data.

resumes.title: Resumes
resumes.description: Generate tailored resumes from your career data.

coverLetters.title: Cover Letters
coverLetters.description: Generate a cover letter tailored to a specific job posting you've analyzed.

jobAnalyzer.title: Job Analyzer
jobAnalyzer.description: Match score, skill gaps, and interview prep for a posting.

interviewPrep.title: Interview Prep
interviewPrep.description: A reusable toolkit of interview answers — tell me about yourself, weaknesses, salary, and behavioral stories — not tied to any one posting.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Courses, credentials and licenses that back up your skills.

education.title: Education
education.description: Degrees, diplomas and bootcamps, included automatically in every resume.

completeness.title: Profile completeness
completeness.allDone: Your knowledge base is complete — every generator has real data to work with.
